mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_record (order_no, pay_channel, amount, status) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{payChannel}, #{amount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, pay_channel, trade_no, amount, status, pay_time, notify_data, create_time FROM payment_record WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_record SET status = 'SUCCESS', trade_no = #{tradeNo}, pay_time = #{payTime}, notify_data = #{notifyData} WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND status = 'PENDING'
